sections.markdown:
- Activity: Afternoon Run
- Started: 2026-02-08 14:33
- Distance: 11 km
- Moving time: 1:19:00
- Elapsed time: 1:19:23
- Elevation gain: 36 m
- Average heart rate: 161.1 bpm
- Max heart rate: 178 bpm
- Average watts: 174.9 W
- Average speed: 8.4 km/h

- Apple Health recorded `242` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `160.7 bpm`, ranging from `91.0` to `175.5 bpm`.
- First-half average HR was `151.9 bpm` and second-half average HR was `169.6 bpm` (+17.7 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `167.6 spm`, with a working range of `137.5` to `182.5 spm` after excluding `2` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `166.2 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `169.1 spm` (+2.9 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `7:09 /km` across `11.043 km` in `1:19:00` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `7:22 /km` and second-half pace was `6:57 /km` (-25 s/km), so pace picked up through the second half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `161.1 bpm` average and `178 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `153.8 bpm` in the first half and `169.6 bpm` in the second (+15.8 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `1:19:00` out of `1:19:23` elapsed (99.5%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `12` stop segments and `1.2%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `62.4 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `1.8 m` and `13.4 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `30.2 m` in the first half and `32.2 m` in the second, so the climbing load was split fairly evenly.
